name: io.github.nogoo9/no-crd
description: Dynamic pod spawner & proxy for ephemeral AI agent workspaces on Kubernetes without CRDs

runtimeArguments.name: --transport
runtimeArguments.description: Transport channel for MCP client-server communication: stdio, http, both

runtimeArguments.name: --mode
runtimeArguments.description: Kubernetes cluster access scope: cluster-wide or namespace-restricted

runtimeArguments.name: --namespace
runtimeArguments.description: Target namespace for workspace pods, services, and local templates

runtimeArguments.name: --port
runtimeArguments.description: HTTP port for SSE transport, routing proxy, and dashboard UI

runtimeArguments.name: --host
runtimeArguments.description: Network interface host address to bind the HTTP server to

runtimeArguments.name: --log-level
runtimeArguments.description: Granularity of output logs: debug, info, warning, error, fatal

runtimeArguments.name: --disable-permission-checks
runtimeArguments.description: Bypass startup diagnostics checking Kubernetes RBAC access permissions

runtimeArguments.name: --cors-origin
runtimeArguments.description: Allowed origins for HTTP CORS cross-site requests (default: *)

runtimeArguments.name: --cors-methods
runtimeArguments.description: Allowed HTTP request methods for CORS configuration

runtimeArguments.name: --cors-headers
runtimeArguments.description: Allowed HTTP header names for incoming CORS requests

runtimeArguments.name: --cors-allow-credentials
runtimeArguments.description: Allow credentials (cookies, headers) in cross-origin requests

runtimeArguments.name: --auth-required-read-scope
runtimeArguments.description: Mandatory OAuth scope claim value to query or get workspaces

runtimeArguments.name: --auth-required-write-scope
runtimeArguments.description: Mandatory OAuth scope claim value to spawn or stop workspaces

runtimeArguments.name: --auth-scope-jsonpath
runtimeArguments.description: JSONPath pattern to extract scope permissions from the token payload

runtimeArguments.name: --auth-required-read-role
runtimeArguments.description: OAuth role required to view workspaces (e.g. reader)

runtimeArguments.name: --auth-required-write-role
runtimeArguments.description: OAuth role required to spawn or delete workspaces (e.g. writer)

runtimeArguments.name: --auth-roles-jsonpath
runtimeArguments.description: JSONPath query to retrieve user roles list from token payload

environmentVariables.name: KUBECONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Path to the Kubernetes API credentials configuration file

environmentVariables.name: BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Hosting URL subpath prefix for gateways and reverse proxies

environmentVariables.name: STATELESS
environmentVariables.description: Disable in-memory session tracking for stateless execution

environmentVariables.name: TLS_CERT
environmentVariables.description: Local file path containing TLS public certificate (HTTPS)

environmentVariables.name: TLS_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Local file path containing TLS private key (HTTPS)

environmentVariables.name: TLS_CA
environmentVariables.description: Local file path containing trusted client Certificate Authority

environmentVariables.name: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED
environmentVariables.description: Set to '0' to allow connection to unverified TLS endpoints

environmentVariables.name: REGISTRY_URL
environmentVariables.description: Default container registry for workspace image resolution

environmentVariables.name: TEMPLATES_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Local filesystem directory containing custom YAML/JSON templates

environmentVariables.name: BUILTIN_TEMPLATES
environmentVariables.description: Enable loading of standard pre-configured templates (default: true)

environmentVariables.name: AUTH_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Enforce JWT verification and user tenant isolation (default: false)

environmentVariables.name: JWT_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'false' to skip OIDC cryptographic signature checks

environmentVariables.name: JWT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: HMAC-SHA symmetric secret key to sign/verify JWT tokens

environmentVariables.name: JWT_PUBLIC_KEY
environmentVariables.description: PEM public key to verify asymmetric OIDC signatures

environmentVariables.name: JWKS_URI
environmentVariables.description: Discovery URI to fetch keys from OIDC provider dynamically

environmentVariables.name: INTROSPECTION_ENDPOINT
environmentVariables.description: RFC 7662 compliant token introspection validation endpoint

environmentVariables.name: OAUTH_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Client identifier for OAuth2 authentication flows

environmentVariables.name: OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Client secret credentials used for token introspection

environmentVariables.name: JWT_AUDIENCE
environmentVariables.description: Target audience check value for incoming OIDC tokens

environmentVariables.name: AUTH_ISSUER
environmentVariables.description: Expected token issuer authority check value (e.g. Keycloak)

environmentVariables.name: AUTH_SUB_JSONPATH
environmentVariables.description: JSONPath pattern to extract user identity subject from token

environmentVariables.name: AUTH_ADMIN_ROLE
environmentVariables.description: Bypass role name that grants admin access (default: nogoo9-admin)

environmentVariables.name: PROXY_SESSION_TTL
environmentVariables.description: Active lifetime in seconds for signed proxy session cookies

environmentVariables.name: PROXY_SESSION_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Secret key for session cookie signing

environmentVariables.name: UI_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Serve the built-in HTML dashboard (default: true)

environmentVariables.name: THEMES_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Filesystem directory to scan for custom CSS themes

environmentVariables.name: THEMES_CONFIGMAP
environmentVariables.description: ConfigMap name storing dynamic CSS theme overrides

environmentVariables.name: DOCS_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory containing static documentation web files to serve

environmentVariables.name: OAUTH_DISCOVERY_URL
environmentVariables.description: Standard OIDC .well-known configuration discovery endpoint

environmentVariables.name: OAUTH_LOGIN_METHOD
environmentVariables.description: UI SSO flow login method: 'redirect' or silent 'iframe'
